briefdescription.para: Initializes the Instance pointer based on a given Config Pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on
Device configuration structure containing required hardware build data
Base address of the device. If address translation is not utilized, this parameter can be passed in using CfgPtr->Config. BaseAddress to specify the physical base address.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful XST_FAILURE in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Resets the given IPI register set.

para.verbatim: This function can be called to disable the IPIs from all the sources and clear any pending IPIs in status register

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance

briefdescription.para: Triggers an IPI to a Destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if an error occurred

briefdescription.para: Polls for an acknowledgement using Observation Register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Mask of the destination CPU from which ACK is expected
Count after which the routines returns failure

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if a timeout occurred

memberdef.argsstring: (XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 SrcCpuMask, u32 *MsgPtr, u32 MsgLength, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XIpiPsu_ReadMessage

briefdescription.para: Read an Incoming Message from a Source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Device Mask for the CPU which has sent the message
Pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
Number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
Type of buffer (XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_MSG or XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_RESP)

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if an error occurred

memberdef.argsstring: (XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 DestCpuMask, const u32 *MsgPtr, u32 MsgLength, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XIpiPsu_WriteMessage

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Device Mask for the destination CPU
Pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
Number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
Type of buffer (XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_MSG or XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_RESP)

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if an error occurred

memberdef.argsstring: (XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 SrcCpuMask, u32 DestCpuMask, u32 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XIpiPsu_GetBufferAddress

briefdescription.para: Gets the Buffer Address for a given pair of CPUs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Mask for Source CPU
Mask for Destination CPU
Type of buffer either XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_MSG or XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_RESP

simplesect.para: Valid Buffer Address if no error NULL if an error occurs in calculating address

briefdescription.para: Gets the Buffer Index for a CPU specified by Mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Mask of the CPU form which Index is required

simplesect.para: Buffer Index value if CPU Mask is valid XIPIPSU_MAX_BUFF_INDEX+1 if not valid

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XIpiPsu_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xipipsu.h for the definition of XIpiPsu_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Buffer size for up to 8 messages, each 4-bytes long.
The xipipsu.c file contains the implementation of the interface functions for XIpiPsu driver.

detaileddescription.para: The xipipsu_sinit.c file contains the implementation of the XIpiPsu component's static initialization functionality.
The xipipsu_hw.h file contains macro definitions for low level Hardware related params.
The xipipsu_helper.c file contains the implementation of the XIpiPsu_CalculateCRC and XIpiPsu_GetBufferIndex.
The xipipsu_buf.c file contains the implementation of the buffer access functions for XIpiPsu driver.
Refer to the header file xipipsu.h for more detailed information.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 mjr 03/15/15 First Release 2.0 mjr 01/22/16 Fixed response buffer address calculation. CR# 932582. 2.1 kvn 05/05/16 Modified code for MISRA-C:2012 Compliance 2.2 kvn 02/17/17 Add support for updating ConfigTable at run time 2.4 sd 07/11/18 Fix a doxygen reported warning 2.6 sd 04/02/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity 2.9 ma 02/12/21 Added IPI CRC functionality sdd 02/17/21 Doxygen fixes ma 03/04/21 Initialize BufferIndex during IPI config init sdd 03/10/21 Fixed misrac warnings. Fixed doxygen warnings. ag 03/31/21 Fixed IPI poll for ack condition check. sd 06/02/21 Update the crc code remove the check for max length. 2.10 sd 07/14/21 Fix a unused label warning 2.12 sd 03/29/22 Make the message pointer in XIpiPsu_WriteMessage constant 2.14 ht 06/13/23 Restructured the code for more modularity 2.17 ht 11/08/24 Update description of Msglength for XIpiPsu_ReadMessage and XIpiPsu_WriteMessage. 2.18 an 08/07/25 Fix pointer to integer cast warning

detaileddescription.para: Refer to the header file xipipsu_buf.h for more detailed information.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
2.6 sd 04/02/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity 2.14 ht 06/13/23 Restructured the code for more modularity

Ver Who Date Changes
2.14 ht 06/13/23 Restructured the code for more modularity ht 07/28/23 Fix MISRA-C warnings 2.17 ma 04/05/25 Read always in 4 bytes from IPI buffer

Ver Who Date Changes -- ----- --------------------------------------------. 1.0 mjr 03/15/15 First release 2.1 kvn 05/05/16 Modified code for MISRA-C:2012 Compliance 2.5 sdd 12/17/18 Add the cpp extern macro 2.11 ma 01/17/22 Added XIPIPSU_BASE_ADDR macro 2.12 sd 02/24/22 Added support for VERSAL NET sd 05/05/22 Added xparameters.h 2.14 sd 07/27/23 Update the target count 2.16 ma 09/10/24 Updated to support VERSAL_2VE_2VM platform 2.17 ht 11/08/24 Update description of XIPIPSU_MSG_BUF_SIZE 2.17 ht 04/24/25 Update IPI bitmask definitions for Versal Platforms

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 mjr 03/15/15 First release 2.1 kvn 05/05/16 Modified code for MISRA-C:2012 Compliance 2.9 sdd 03/11/21 Moved declaration to header files 2.19 vlt 12/12/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details 2.19 vlt 03/14/26 Updated BaseAddress type from u32 to UINTPTR to support 64-bit addressing
